title: Croatian Bun Sandwich
description: A simple, tangy sandwich made with Croatian bun and filled with a delicate spread.

ingredients.name: Tangy pickled vegetables (such as pickled cucumbers or sauerkraut)

instructions: 1. Slice the Croatian bun in half and toast until lightly browned.
2. Spread a layer of the delicate spread on the bottom half of the bun.
3. Top the spread with a layer of tangy pickled vegetables.
4. Sprinkle fresh parsley over the pickled vegetables.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Top with the top half of the bun.
